name: Christmas Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Blend in the orange juice, corn syrup, and molasses.
3. Combine the flours, ground ginger, baking soda, salt, cloves, nutmeg, and allspice in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well until combined.
5. Chill the dough for 3-4 hours or overnight.
6. Roll out a portion of the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
7. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
8. Place the cookies 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
9. Repeat with the remaining dough.
10. Bake at 350°F for 12-14 minutes. The cookies will be soft and chewy if baked for 12 minutes; they will become crisper if baked longer.
11. Yield: 6-7 dozen cookies.
